# `draw.gannSquare`

> **Stability:** stable
> **Since:** 0.3
> **Bucket:** `other`
> **Wire kind:** `gann-square`

Draw a Gann square-of-nine sized by two world anchors. The renderer
paints a canvas-space square whose side is `max(|dx|, |dy|)` between
the anchors, subdivided by `GANN_LEVELS`. Mirrors invinite's
`gann-square-tool.ts` shape.

## Anchors

`a`, `b` — two `WorldPoint`s

Anchor count: 2.

## Signature

```ts
function gannSquare(a: WorldPoint, b: WorldPoint, opts?: LineDrawStyle): DrawingHandle;
```

_The leading `slotId: string` parameter is injected by the chartlang compiler at every callsite — script authors call `draw.gannSquare(...)` without it._

## Example

```ts
import { defineIndicator } from "@invinite-org/chartlang-core";
    export default defineIndicator({
        name: "draw.gannSquare demo",
        apiVersion: 1,
        compute({ bar, draw }) {
            draw.gannSquare(
                { time: bar.time, price: bar.low },
                { time: bar.time + 30_000, price: bar.high },
            );
        },
    });
```
